title: Soft delete intent vs hard-delete code
brief: The spec says deleting a record soft-deletes it. The repository currently hard-deletes. Intended behavior is soft delete.

expectedScenarios.title: Delete marks record as deleted
expectedScenarios.expectedAssertionHint: record still exists with deletedAt set

forbiddenClaims.statement: Delete permanently removes the record — contradicts the soft-delete intent.
